title: The Voiceless Sacrifice of the Black Dragon
titleRomaji: Koe Naki Niehime to Kokuryuu no Kekkon
titleEnglish: The Voiceless Sacrifice of the Black Dragon
titleNative: 声なき贄姫と黒龍の結婚
synonyms: The Silent Sacrifice Princess And The Black Dragon's Marriage
The Voiceless Sacrifice of the Black Dragon
synopsis: The Kozuki family was granted the Black Dragon's blessing, allowing them to heal the sick and purify impurity with their voices alone. But Ayame's life shatters after her parents' death, leaving her at the mercy of her cruel aunt and uncle, who tortured her until she lost her voice. As their daughter, Mari, rises to become the new priestess, Ayame is offered as a sacrifice to the Black Dragon. "Why do I have to die like this? Please help me!" In response to her desperate plea, the Black Dragon appears as a striking man and takes her hand, whisking her away to his realm. Chosen to be the bride of the Black Dragon Saku, Ayame finds herself in the enchanting Black Dragon Manor, suspended between the heavens and the human world. But jealousy ignites in Mari, who vows to reclaim Saku and make Ayame suffer once more. (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!
titleEnglish: Dragon Ball: That Time I Got Reincarnated as Yamcha!
titleRomaji: Dragon Ball Gaiden: Tensei-shitara Yamcha Datta Ken
titleNative: ドラゴンボール外伝　転生したらヤムチャだった件
synopsis: A Japanese high school student is on his way to a Dragon Ball event with a friend. Suddenly, he sees a cute girl wearing a short skirt, but when he runs over to get a closer look, he trips and gets knocked out. Upon waking up, he realizes he's turned into Yamcha from Dragon Ball. Being an avid fan of the series, he knows what lies ahead in Yamcha's future, thus he decides to take matters into his own hands, in order to change Yamcha's fate. Note: Includes 2 extra chapters.

title: ROLL OVER AND DIE: I Will Fight for an Ordinary Life with My Love and Cursed Sword!
titleRomaji: "Omae Gotoki ga Maou ni Kateru to Omou na" to Yuusha Party wo Tsuihou Sareta node, Outo de Kimama ni Kurashitai
titleEnglish: ROLL OVER AND DIE: I Will Fight for an Ordinary Life with My Love and Cursed Sword!
titleNative: 「お前ごときが魔王に勝てると思うな」と勇者パーティを追放されたので、王都で気ままに暮らしたい
synonyms: omaegotoki
Omae Gotoki
Do You Think Someone like You Could Defeat the Demon Lord?
「就凭你也想打败魔王吗」被勇者一行所驱逐的少女要如何才能在王都过上自由的生活
Bị đuổi khỏi nhóm Anh hùng, tôi muốn sống tự do tự tại ở Vương đô
synopsis: Flum Apricot was never meant to be a hero. Despite zero stats across the board and a power she can’t even use, she somehow finds herself included in a party of heroes. But Flum’s life hits rock bottom when the party’s renowned sage, Jean Inteige, decides that the useless girl is dead weight, and arranges to have her sold into slavery. Tossed to monsters to be feasted upon for her master’s entertainment, Flum makes the desperate choice to reach for a cursed weapon…and something new awakens within her. A grimdark tale about one woman’s blood-soaked quest to reclaim her life! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Saiyuki
synonyms: Gensomaden Saiyuki
synopsis: Genjo is a Buddhist priest in the city of Shangri-La, which is being ravaged by yokai spirits that have fallen out of balance with the natural order. His superiors send him on a journey far to the west to discover why this is happening and how to stop it. His companions are three yokai with human souls. But this is no day trip—the four will encounter many discoveries and horrors on the way, and on the road, Genjo will wonder … can he really trust his supernatural companions? (Source: Kodansha USA)

synopsis: Volume 1 : The Laughing Vampire. While a young boy, just resurrected as a vampire, commits acts of awful ferocity, the city around him shows all its perversion. The adults abuse their power, the boys degenerate and use all the available means to achieve their goal to give vent to their low instincts. Whoever can't understand and make opposition is doomed to change or becoming crazy. So which is the real horror? The vampire who kills in order to feed himself or the crawling disease hidden in society, which slowy corrupts without being noticed? Volume 2 : Paradise. Following the events narrated in the first volume, Luna and Konosuke are now living together with the old woman vampire as fellows, as lovers, in a diabolic innocence, killing for quieting their thirst for blood, joining death and love under the dream of eternal youth. Meanwhile, a young boy named Makoto is looking for his lost sister Miko, who disappeared years ago in mysterious circumstances. But what really happened to that girl who liked eating grubs and dreamed of becoming one of them? And is there really a terrible secret that someone is hiding? The paths of all the characters will dramatically collide, bringing unex

title: A Certain Magical Index
titleNative: とある魔術の禁書目録
synonyms: To Aru Majutsu no Kinsho Mokuroku
Toaru Majutsu no Kinsho Mokuroku
To Aru Majutsu no Index
อินเด็กซ์ คัมภีร์คาถาต้องห้าม
synopsis: The story is set in a world where supernatural powers exist through science, and magic exists through religion. In the story, Touma Kamijou is an ordinary high school boy with terrible academic scores and a power called Imagine Breaker. Imagine Breaker can defeat any other power, but it also undermines Kamijou's own good luck. His Imagine Breaker's immense strength is literally immeasurable, so hapless Kamijou is listed at the supernatural level of 0. He happens to meet a girl in white hanging off his window balcony. The girl says she is being chased by sorcerers, and Kamijou learns that the girl is a Church of England nun whose memories have been forcibly replaced by Index-Librorum-Prohibitorum — the 103,000 forbidden texts of the Church.

titleRomaji: Sono Monban, Saikyou Nitsuki: Tsuihou Sareta Bougyo Ryoku 9999 no Senshi, Outo no Monban Toshite Musou suru
titleNative: その門番、最強につき～追放された防御力9999の戦士、王都の門番として無双する～
synonyms: That Gatekeeper, Because He is the Strongest: The Exiled Warrior with 9999 Defense Power, Unmatched as the Gatekeeper of the Royal Capital
그 문지기, 최강이기에 ~추방당한 방어력 9999의 전사, 왕도의 문지기로서 무쌍한다~
synopsis: Sieg is an adventurer with an incredible defensive power, and he always uses himself to attract the monsters' attention to assist his teammates. However, the party leader just focused on offense without realizing Sieg's intention, so he kicked him out. After Sieg left, the team repeatedly failed multiple quests … At the same time, Sieg took the position of gatekeeper at the Royal Capital. Thanks to his defensive power, he was quickly promoted to division captain. His subordinates included a carefree big-breasted Swordswoman, a perverse freakish girl, and an Archer with an erratic temperament. He and the girls started slowly gaining the trust of people around them!

title: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleEnglish: The Legendary Witch Is Reborn as an Oppressed Princess
titleRomaji: Shiitagerareta Tsuihou Oujo wa, Tenseishita Densetsu no Majo Deshita
titleNative: 虐げられた追放王女は、転生した伝説の魔女でした
synopsis: Princess Claudia's life should be tragic… pushed from a window by her uncle, coldly ignored, and dismissed by all. But when her past-life memories awaken, she remembers she was Adelheid, a legendary witch who once commanded legions of magicians. Now reborn, she refuses to be anything but herself: fabulously powerful and utterly carefree! (Source: Titan Manga)

title: Mietemasu yo! Aizawa-san
titleNative: 見えてますよ! 愛沢さん
synonyms: I See You, Aizawa-san!
synopsis: Michi has always been troubled by the fact that she can see ghosts. She pretends not to see, trying not to get involved. However, a ghost has appeared that even she cannot ignore. It is Honami Aizawa, a former member of the popular idol group De:LPhinus. She was also a classmate of Michi, and she haunts the classroom out of unfulfilled longing. Michi is determined not to get involved with ghosts, but she finds herself following Honami's childish and outlandish behavior, unable to look away from her ardent fan-service(?)....... (Source: Comic Valkyrie, translated)

title: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleRomaji: Saikyou Onmyouji no Isekai Tenseiki: Geboku no Youkaidomo ni Kurabete Monster ga Yowai Sugirundaga @comic
titleEnglish: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Exorcist In Another World
titleNative: 最強陰陽師の異世界転生記 ～下僕の妖怪どもに比べてモンスターが弱すぎるんだが～
synonyms: The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji: These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai
The Reincarnation of the Strongest Onmyoji ~ These Monsters Are Too Weak Compared to My Youkai~
synopsis: Haruyoshi Kuga's power as the strongest exorcist is all for naught when he is betrayed by his closest ally. With his dying breath, he casts the secret Spell of Reincarnation—when he next opens his eyes, he finds himself in a different world altogether, reincarnated as Seika Lamprogue, the son of a family of magic scholars! He quickly learns that the magic in this new world is quite unlike the sorcery he learned in his past life and that he can't use it. Fortunately for him, with his mastery of curses and the hordes of youkai at his disposal, he doesn't need to. Haruyoshi (now Seika) is determined not to repeat his past mistakes in his second life by smartly laying low and avoiding flaunting his power. Yet accomplishing his goals and without drawing attention to himself proves to be easier said than done—will his powers be enough to live a happy life?! (Source: J-Novel Club)

synopsis: After Hiraku dies of a serious illness, God brings him back to life, gives his health and youth back, and sends him to a fantasy world of his choice. In order to enjoy his second shot, God bestows upon him the almighty farming tool! Watch as Hiraku digs, chops
latestChapterTitle: The Village Chief and the Camping Wagon (2)

title: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleRomaji: Henkyougurashi no Maou, Tensei shite Saikyou no Majutsushi ni Naru
titleNative: 辺境ぐらしの魔王、転生して最強の魔術師になる
synonyms: The Demon King of the Frontier Life, Reincarnated To Become the Strongest Mage ~The Former Demon King Who Grows up While Being Loved, Wants To Know Humans~
synopsis: There was a mage called "The Lone Demon King" at the frontier. He was just a creature that never grew old, but he was loved by the villagers as something of a guardian deity. However, he was destroyed by a magic organization that sees his existence as dangerous. 200 years later, he is reincarnated as the second son of an aristocrat and obtains the strongest magic power. "Let's pretend to be a human this time..." However, being a human lover, he didn't particularly think of revenge and has decided to pretend to be human in this life. In his past life, he was the guardian deity of a region, and in this life, he's a local aristocrat, but he does not know common sense. He doesn't know how to take it easy. As the second son of an aristocrat, he is loved by his family and friends, and while he is regarded as a master of magic in the magic guild, he becomes an "Immortal Mage" behind the scenes. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)
